fact_tables.name: FactDetermination
fact_tables.description: Captures details and outcomes of initial determinations and reconsiderations for coverage and payment, serving as the central fact for CMS reporting.
fact_tables.grain: One row represents a single Organization Determination or Reconsideration event.

columns.name: determination_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the determination event.

columns.name: patient_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimPatient for the enrollee involved in the determination.

columns.name: provider_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimProvider for the primary provider associated with the request or decision.

columns.name: organization_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimOrganization for the plan/organization making the determination.

columns.name: condition_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimCondition for the primary diagnosis associated with the determination.

columns.name: request_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the date the determination request was received.

columns.name: decision_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the date the determination decision was made.

columns.name: claim_received_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the date the claim was received (applicable for payment decisions).

columns.name: service_start_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the start date of the service related to the determination.

columns.name: service_end_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the end date of the service related to the determination.

columns.name: od_number
columns.description: Unique identifier for the Organization Determination.

columns.name: appeal_number
columns.description: Unique identifier for the Appeal or Reconsideration.

columns.name: associated_od_number
columns.description: Organization Determination number associated with a Reconsideration.

columns.name: requesting_party_code
columns.description: Code indicating the party requesting the determination (e.g., 01-enrollee, 03-contract provider).

columns.name: is_contracted_provider_referral
columns.description: Indicates if the referral for the determination was from a contracted provider.

columns.name: item_service_code
columns.description: Code for the requested item, service, or Part B drug (CPT, HCPCS, J code, DRG) (degenerate dimension).

columns.name: item_service_description
columns.description: Description of the requested item, service, or Part B drug (degenerate dimension).

columns.name: is_prior_auth_required
columns.description: Indicates if prior authorization was required for the requested item/service.

columns.name: processing_priority
columns.description: Processing priority for the determination (S-Standard, E-Expedited).

columns.name: is_expedited_processing_requested
columns.description: Indicates if expedited processing was requested for the determination.

columns.name: disposition
columns.description: Outcome of the determination (F-Fully favorable, P-Partially favorable, A-Adverse, D-Dismissal).

columns.name: dismissal_rationale
columns.description: Reason for dismissal of the determination (e.g., Requestor not permitted, Invalid request).

columns.name: decision_rationale
columns.description: Reason for the determination decision (e.g., Cost Sharing/Benefit Limits, Lack of Medical Necessity). Organizational decision applied: numerical prefixes removed, only descriptive reasons reported.

columns.name: were_internal_plan_criteria_applied
columns.description: Indicates if internal plan coverage criteria were applied during the review.

columns.name: did_third_party_vendor_participate
columns.description: Indicates if a third-party vendor participated in the determination review or decision-making.

columns.name: is_approved_item_different_from_requested
columns.description: For favorable decisions, indicates if the approved item, service, or Part B drug was different from what was requested.

columns.name: approved_item_service_code
columns.description: Procedure code for the approved item, service, or Part B drug (if different from requested) (degenerate dimension).

columns.name: service_location_zip_code
columns.description: Zip code of the service location (degenerate dimension).

columns.name: place_of_service_code
columns.description: Code for the place of service (degenerate dimension).

columns.name: is_clean_claim
columns.description: Indicates if the claim was considered a 'clean claim' for payment decisions.

columns.name: was_prior_approval_requested
columns.description: Indicates if prior approval (e.g., prior authorization or voluntary pre-service request) was requested.

columns.name: prior_approval_od_number
columns.description: OD number for an associated prior approval request, if prior approval was requested.

columns.name: is_prior_auth_required_for_coverage
columns.description: Indicates if prior authorization was a required condition for coverage (if prior approval requested).

columns.name: is_appeal_of_od_dismissal
columns.description: Indicates if the reconsideration is an appeal of an Organization Determination dismissal.

columns.name: was_initial_od_denied_medical_necessity
columns.description: Indicates if the initial OD request was denied for lack of medical necessity.

columns.name: was_reconsideration_reviewed_by_physician
columns.description: Indicates if the reconsideration request was reviewed by a physician.

columns.name: determination_type
columns.description: Type of determination (e.g., 'Initial Determination', 'Reconsideration').

columns.name: determination_subtype
columns.description: Subtype of determination (e.g., 'Coverage Decision', 'Payment Decision').

columns.name: determination_count
columns.description: Count of determination events (always 1 per row).

fact_tables.name: FactEncounter
fact_tables.description: Captures details about patient encounters. While not directly generating measures for this specific CMS report, it provides contextual data.
fact_tables.grain: One row represents a single patient encounter.

columns.name: encounter_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the encounter.

columns.name: patient_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimPatient.

columns.name: provider_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimProvider for the primary practitioner of the encounter.

columns.name: organization_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimOrganization for the service provider organization.

columns.name: start_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the start date of the encounter.

columns.name: end_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the end date of the encounter.

columns.name: encounter_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Encounter resource ID.

columns.name: class_code
columns.description: Code classifying the type of encounter (e.g., inpatient, outpatient, emergency).

columns.name: discharge_disposition
columns.description: The disposition of the patient at discharge from a hospital encounter.

columns.name: encounter_count
columns.description: Count of encounters (always 1 per row).

fact_tables.name: FactProcedure
fact_tables.description: Captures details about procedures and services performed. While not directly generating measures for this specific CMS report, it provides contextual data.
fact_tables.grain: One row represents a single procedure or service.

columns.name: procedure_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the procedure.

columns.name: patient_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimPatient.

columns.name: provider_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimProvider for the performing practitioner.

columns.name: organization_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimOrganization for the performing organization.

columns.name: performed_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the date the procedure was performed.

columns.name: procedure_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Procedure resource ID.

columns.name: procedure_code
columns.description: CPT/HCPCS code for the procedure or service.

columns.name: procedure_description
columns.description: Description of the procedure or service.

columns.name: procedure_count
columns.description: Count of procedures (always 1 per row).

fact_tables.name: FactMedication
fact_tables.description: Captures details about medication requests (e.g., Part B drugs). While not directly generating measures for this specific CMS report, it provides contextual data.
fact_tables.grain: One row represents a single medication request.

columns.name: medication_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the medication request.

columns.name: patient_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimPatient.

columns.name: provider_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimProvider for the prescribing practitioner.

columns.name: organization_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimOrganization for the prescribing organization.

columns.name: authored_on_date_key
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate for the date the medication request was authored.

columns.name: medication_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR MedicationRequest resource ID.

columns.name: medication_code
columns.description: J code for the Part B drug.

columns.name: medication_description
columns.description: Description of the Part B drug.

columns.name: medication_request_count
columns.description: Count of medication requests (always 1 per row).

dimension_tables.name: DimPatient
dimension_tables.description: Attributes of the patient (enrollee) involved in determinations and other healthcare events.

columns.name: patient_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the patient.

columns.name: patient_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Patient resource ID.

columns.name: mbi
columns.description: Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI).

columns.name: is_deceased
columns.description: Indicates if the patient is deceased.

columns.name: gender
columns.description: Patient's gender.

columns.name: birth_date
columns.description: Patient's birth date.

dimension_tables.name: DimProvider
dimension_tables.description: Attributes of healthcare providers involved in requests, reviews, or service delivery.

columns.name: provider_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the provider.

columns.name: provider_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Practitioner resource ID.

columns.name: npi
columns.description: National Provider Identifier (NPI).

columns.name: provider_name
columns.description: Full name of the provider.

columns.name: qualification
columns.description: Professional qualification of the provider (e.g., Physician, Other Appropriate Healthcare Professional).

dimension_tables.name: DimOrganization
dimension_tables.description: Attributes of organizations involved, such as health plans, requesting parties, or third-party vendors.

columns.name: organization_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the organization.

columns.name: organization_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Organization resource ID.

columns.name: organization_name
columns.description: Name of the organization.

columns.name: organization_type
columns.description: Type of organization (e.g., MAO, 1876 Cost Plan, Physician's Office, IRE, Appeals Council).

columns.name: contract_number
columns.description: Contract number associated with the organization/plan.

columns.name: plan_benefit_package
columns.description: Plan Benefit Package (PBP) identifier.

dimension_tables.name: DimCondition
dimension_tables.description: Attributes of medical conditions or diagnoses relevant to determinations.

columns.name: condition_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the condition.

columns.name: condition_fhir_id
columns.description: FHIR Condition resource ID.

columns.name: condition_code
columns.description: Diagnosis Code (ICD-10, HIPPS).

columns.name: condition_description
columns.description: Description of the diagnosis.

dimension_tables.name: DimDate
dimension_tables.description: Standard date dimension for time-based analysis of all events.

columns.name: date_key
columns.description: Surrogate key for the date (format YYYYMMDD).

columns.name: full_date
columns.description: The full date.

columns.name: day_of_week
columns.description: Name of the day of the week (e.g., 'Monday').

columns.name: day_name
columns.description: Full name of the day (e.g., 'Monday').

columns.name: day_of_month
columns.description: Day of the month (1-31).

columns.name: day_of_year
columns.description: Day of the year (1-366).

columns.name: week_of_year
columns.description: Week number of the year (1-53).

columns.name: month
columns.description: Month number (1-12).

columns.name: month_name
columns.description: Full name of the month (e.g., 'January').

columns.name: quarter
columns.description: Quarter of the year (1-4).

columns.name: year
columns.description: Year.

columns.name: is_weekend
columns.description: Flag indicating if the date is a weekend.

columns.name: fiscal_period
columns.description: Fiscal period (e.g., 'Q1').

metrics.name: total_determinations_count
metrics.description: Total number of initial determinations and reconsiderations.

metrics.name: favorable_determinations_count
metrics.description: Count of determinations with a 'Fully favorable' or 'Partially favorable' disposition.
metrics.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN disposition IN ('F', 'P') THEN determination_key END)

metrics.name: adverse_determinations_count
metrics.description: Count of determinations with an 'Adverse' disposition.
metrics.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN disposition = 'A' THEN determination_key END)

metrics.name: dismissed_determinations_count
metrics.description: Count of determinations with a 'Dismissal' disposition.
metrics.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN disposition = 'D' THEN determination_key END)

metrics.name: expedited_processing_requested_count
metrics.description: Count of determinations where expedited processing was requested.
metrics.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_expedited_processing_requested = TRUE THEN determination_key END)

metrics.name: prior_auth_required_count
metrics.description: Count of determinations where prior authorization was required for the requested item/service.
metrics.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_prior_auth_required = TRUE THEN determination_key END)

metrics.name: total_procedures_count
metrics.description: Total number of procedures or services performed.

attributes.name: Enrollee MBI
attributes.description: Medicare Beneficiary Identifier for the enrollee.

attributes.name: Patient Gender
attributes.description: Gender of the patient.

attributes.name: Provider NPI
attributes.description: National Provider Identifier for the provider.

attributes.name: Provider Qualification
attributes.description: Professional qualification of the provider (e.g., Physician).

attributes.name: Organization Name
attributes.description: Name of the organization.

attributes.name: Organization Type
attributes.description: Type of organization (e.g., MAO, 1876 Cost Plan).

attributes.name: Contract Number
attributes.description: Contract number of the plan.

attributes.name: Plan Benefit Package (PBP)
attributes.description: Plan Benefit Package identifier.

attributes.name: Diagnosis Code
attributes.description: ICD-10 or HIPPS diagnosis code.

attributes.name: OD Number
attributes.description: Organization Determination Number.

attributes.name: Appeal Number
attributes.description: Appeal Number for reconsiderations.

attributes.name: Requesting Party
attributes.description: Party that requested the determination (e.g., enrollee, provider).

attributes.name: Contracted Provider Referral
attributes.description: Indicates if the referral was from a contracted provider.

attributes.name: Item/Service Code
attributes.description: Code for the requested item, service, or Part B drug.

attributes.name: Prior Authorization Required
attributes.description: Indicates if prior authorization was required.

attributes.name: Processing Priority
attributes.description: Priority of processing (Standard or Expedited).

attributes.name: Expedited Processing Requested
attributes.description: Indicates if expedited processing was requested.

attributes.name: Disposition
attributes.description: Outcome of the determination (Fully favorable, Adverse, etc.).

attributes.name: Dismissal Rationale
attributes.description: Reason for dismissal of a determination.

attributes.name: Decision Rationale
attributes.description: Reason for the determination decision.

attributes.name: Internal Plan Criteria Applied
attributes.description: Indicates if internal plan coverage criteria were applied.

attributes.name: Third-Party Vendor Participation
attributes.description: Indicates if a third-party vendor participated in the review.

attributes.name: Approved Item Different from Requested
attributes.description: Indicates if the approved item/service differed from the requested one.

attributes.name: Service Location Zip Code
attributes.description: Zip code of the service location.

attributes.name: Place of Service Code
attributes.description: Code for the place of service.

attributes.name: Clean Claim
attributes.description: Indicates if the claim was clean.

attributes.name: Prior Approval Requested
attributes.description: Indicates if prior approval was requested.

attributes.name: Appeal of OD Dismissal
attributes.description: Indicates if the reconsideration appeals an OD dismissal.

attributes.name: Initial OD Denied Medical Necessity
attributes.description: Indicates if the initial OD was denied for lack of medical necessity.

attributes.name: Reconsideration Reviewed by Physician
attributes.description: Indicates if the reconsideration was reviewed by a physician.

attributes.name: Determination Type
attributes.description: Type and subtype of the determination (e.g., Initial Coverage Decision).

attributes.name: Date - Year
attributes.description: Year of the event date.

attributes.name: Date - Quarter
attributes.description: Quarter of the event date.

attributes.name: Date - Month
attributes.description: Month of the event date.

attributes.name: Date - Day
attributes.description: Full date of the event.

attributes.name: Encounter Class
attributes.description: Classification of the patient encounter.

attributes.name: Discharge Disposition
attributes.description: Patient's disposition at hospital discharge.

attributes.name: Procedure Code
attributes.description: Code and description of the performed procedure/service.

attributes.name: Medication Code
attributes.description: Code and description of the requested medication.
